name: llbs
description: LLBS Living Well Together Strategy page and LLBS Photo Brander tool.

scripts.lint: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.copy-fonts: mkdir -p assets/fonts && cp node_modules/@fontsource/dm-sans/files/dm-sans-latin-400-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource/dm-sans/files/dm-sans-latin-500-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource/dm-sans/files/dm-sans-latin-700-normal.woff2 assets/fonts/ && cp node_modules/@fontsource/dm-sans/LICENSE assets/fonts/dm-sans-LICENSE.txt
